title: Carry out canopy maintenance
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out canopy maintenance demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for canopy maintenance activities

pcs.text: Confirm canopy maintenance activities and instructions with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm canopy maintenance activities and instructions with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm canopy maintenance activities and instructions with supervisor.

pcs.text: Select tools and equipment appropriate to canopy maintenance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools and equipment appropriate to canopy maintenance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools and equipment appropriate to canopy maintenance.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health and safety hazards, and report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Select and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace health and safety requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace health and safety requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) according to workplace health and safety requirements.

pcs.text: Fit and use PPE applicable to the task being undertaken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Fit and use PPE applicable to the task being undertaken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Fit and use PPE applicable to the task being undertaken.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for canopy maintenance activities

elements.title: Carry out basic canopy maintenance

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and prune unwanted growth?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and prune unwanted growth.

pcs.text: Remove pruned material out of the canopy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove pruned material out of the canopy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove pruned material out of the canopy.

pcs.text: Perform post-pruning treatments on the canopy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform post-pruning treatments on the canopy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform post-pruning treatments on the canopy.

pcs.text: Shape, support or position canopy according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Shape, support or position canopy according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shape, support or position canopy according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Use control measures to regulate exposure of the crop to sun and protect crop from damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use control measures to regulate exposure of the crop to sun and protect crop from damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use control measures to regulate exposure of the crop to sun and protect crop from damage.

pcs.text: Operate and maintain tools and equipment according to instructions and manufacturer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Operate and maintain tools and equipment according to instructions and manufacturer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Operate and maintain tools and equipment according to instructions and manufacturer instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out basic canopy maintenance

elements.title: Complete canopy maintenance activities

pcs.text: Clean, sharpen and return tools and equipment to required location
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, sharpen and return tools and equipment to required location?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, sharpen and return tools and equipment to required location.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable tools and equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable tools and equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable tools and equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Dispose of pruned material according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of pruned material according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of pruned material according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Record and report canopy maintenance activities according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report canopy maintenance activities according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report canopy maintenance activities according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete canopy maintenance activities
